name: Tee Times Rochester Hills
address: 2612 S Rochester Rd, Rochester Hills, MI 48307
about: Tee Times Rochester Hills is an indoor golf simulator venue featuring 12 bays equipped with Golfzon TwoVision Plus technology. The facility offers a comprehensive golf experience with a full-service bar and kitchen, leagues, tournaments, event hosting, and PGA instruction. Patrons can play on over 200 courses worldwide and utilize advanced training features like a 24-position swing plate and multi-surface hitting mats. Pricing is based on hourly bay rentals and varies by day and time.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Golfzon TwoVision Plus simulators with high-accuracy data tracking
Multi-surface hitting mats including fairway, rough, and bunker for realistic practice
Full-service bar and kitchen available on-site for food and drinks
24-position swing plate recreates true course contours and lie angles

simulator_hardware.notes: 12 bays equipped with 24-position swing plate, multi-surface mats, and auto tee retrieval

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue provides top-of-the-line golf equipment, but you are welcome to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted. Tee Times has a full-service bar and kitchen available.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time required for an 18-hole round depends on the course and pace of play, but typically ranges from 2 to 3 hours.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility is family-friendly and can accommodate children. It is suitable for various types of gatherings including family events.
